text: RC me neem oil spray hua
SC me neem oil 5 ml per liter spray
whitefly bahut hai imidacloprid spray karo
SC me red spider mites aa gaye
water mold fungus ke liye metalaxyl
bacterial leaf spot ke liye copper
blight control ke liye copper oxychloride
stem base rot ke liye validamycin
SC me kaunsa fertilizer dena hai
vegetative stage me fertilizer kya de
